expected_behavior: Flags the unstructured console.log prose (recommend structured key-value logging with consistent fields)
Flags the PII (phone number) in the log line
Flags log-and-rethrow double-logging and the missing correlation/job id linking this to the rest of the job's logs
Flags the readiness probe that doesn't check any dependency health
Flags the irreversible destructive job with no kill switch / feature flag and no documented rollback
Flags the missing instrumentation (no metric or log of how many accounts were purged) on a high-stakes operation

scenarios.query:
Review this change:
```python
log.info("export_complete", export_id=export.id, request_id=ctx.request_id,
         rows=row_count, duration_ms=elapsed_ms)
metrics.histogram("export.duration_ms", elapsed_ms)
metrics.counter("export.rows", rows=row_count)
```
expected_behavior: Recognizes structured logging with correlation id and golden-signal instrumentation
Does not demand additional observability machinery for an already well-instrumented operation
